honest_cooperator.description: Warm cooperative messages and consistently fair returns.
honest_cooperator.expected_model_response: high trust and high next investment

charming_under_returner.description: Warm promises and friendly excuses, but consistently mildly low returns.
charming_under_returner.expected_model_response: lower trust if behavior-grounded; elevated trust if verbally pulled

cautious_reliable.description: Cautious noncommittal messages, but consistently fair returns.

strategic_opportunist.description: Fair returns at low stake but low returns at high stake while maintaining cooperative language.
strategic_opportunist.return_pattern: 45-55% at low stakes, 15-30% at high stakes
strategic_opportunist.expected_model_response: low trust if model detects conditional exploitation

noisy_repairing.description: Usually fair, sometimes low return, then later compensates.
noisy_repairing.return_pattern: mostly fair, low-return events followed by compensation
noisy_repairing.expected_model_response: moderate-to-high trust if model distinguishes noise from exploitation

apology_only_exploiter.description: Low returns with repeated apologies, but no compensation.
apology_only_exploiter.expected_model_response: low trust if model ignores cheap apology
